Your Zitadel cloud instance name

The Zitadel Management API provides comprehensive identity infrastructure management including users, organizations, projects, applications, roles, policies, and identity providers. Accessible via REST at /management/v1/ with gRPC transcoding support. Zitadel is an open source identity platform supporting OAuth 2.0, OIDC, SAML, SCIM, FIDO2, and passkeys.

Contact Support:
 Name: Zitadel
